issues.message: The mobile input group and the hidden input group are not separated by an `<hr>` element.
The reset button group and the submit button group are not separated by an `<hr>` element.
The range input's `min` attribute should be `0`.
The range input's `max` attribute should be `400`.
The range input's `step` attribute should be `50`. In `Lessons 28To30.html`
The username input is missing the `autofocus` attribute.
The job inputs should use `type="radio"` instead of `type="checkbox"`.
The textarea has a duplicate `name` attribute and the `name` should be `brief`.
The textarea's default text should be placed inside the `<textarea>` tags, not in a `placeholder` attribute.
The URL input is missing the `required` attribute.
The iframe element is commented out and thus not present on the page.
The accessibility range text "10 To 20" should have a lowercase 't' in "to".
One of the skill `div` elements has `tabindex="o"` instead of `tabindex="0"`.
